category_desc: 与销售订单相关的业务指标与实体
definition: 最近7天内有过成功履约订单的线下实体门店总数。
calculation_logic: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT store_id) FROM `retail_dwh.orders` WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND status = 'COMPLETED'

definition: 历史累计消费金额大于 10,000 元且最近 30 天有过消费的用户。
calculation_logic: SELECT user_id FROM `retail_dwh.user_summary` WHERE lifetime_value > 10000 AND days_since_last_purchase <= 30
